misc: Famous for being an ambassador for the AimPoint method for putting.
biography: Timo, a celebrated figure hailing from Keimola Golf, is set to mark his ninth appearance at the upcoming Hector Trophée 2026. With a remarkable record of three Hector Trophée victories, Timo has proven to be a formidable competitor in this pair competition.

Known for his calm demeanor on the course, Timo is also an avid proponent of the AimPoint method for putting, often sharing his insights with fellow golfers. His dedication to the sport and his analytical approach make him a respected ambassador for this innovative technique.

While the coveted Victor Trophy has eluded him thus far, Timo's consistent performance and strategic prowess make him a perennial contender. As he prepares for the Hector Trophée 2026, many eyes will be on Timo to see if he can add another victory to his already impressive record.
